kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Verify Successful Login
Verify User On Secure Area
Wait Until Location Is
kw.msg: Location did not become 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/secure' in 5 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.
kw.status: Location did not become 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/secure' in 5 seconds.

kw.name: Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

kw.status: Location did not become 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/secure' in 5 seconds.
Location did not become 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/secure' in 5 seconds.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Test successful login with valid username and password
test.status:
Several failures occurred:
1) Location did not become 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/secure' in 5 seconds.
2) User keyword cannot be empty.

test.name: TC_002 Failed Login With Incorrect Password

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Verify Failed Login With Invalid Password
Verify User On Login Page
Wait Until Location Is
kw.msg: Location did not become 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/login' in 5 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.
kw.status: Location did not become 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/login' in 5 seconds.

kw.name: Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

kw.status: Location did not become 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/login' in 5 seconds.

kw.name: Verify Error Message For Invalid Password

kw.status: Location did not become 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/login' in 5 seconds.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Test failed login with correct username but incorrect password
test.status:
Several failures occurred:
1) Location did not become 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/login' in 5 seconds.
2) User keyword cannot be empty.

test.name: TC_003 Failed Login With Incorrect Username

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Test failed login with incorrect username but correct password
test.status:
Several failures occurred:
1) Location did not become 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/login' in 5 seconds.
2) User keyword cannot be empty.

test.name: TC_004 Logout After Successful Login

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Login And Navigate To Secure Area
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Verify User On Secure Area
Wait Until Location Is
kw.msg: Location did not become 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/secure' in 5 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.
kw.status: Location did not become 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/secure' in 5 seconds.

kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

kw.status: Location did not become 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/secure' in 5 seconds.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Test successful logout after logging into secure area
test.status:
Several failures occurred:
1) Location did not become 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/secure' in 5 seconds.
2) User keyword cannot be empty.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
